_comment: Live-run question cluster: REAL variableIds from api.futarchy.ai/v1/net (fetched 2026-07-15). Chosen for GENUINE (non-deterministic) conditional structure — the scientifically load-bearing case, per the Stage 3 finding that pure-constraint ladders only test coherence. AGI drives automation: a real conditional edge in the live net.

AGI41.title: AGI training requirements are met by 2041

GOODS39.title: AI automates 5% of goods-and-services tasks by 2039

GOODS40.title: AI automates 5% of goods-and-services tasks by 2040

RND.title: AI automates 5% of R&D tasks by 2034

genuine_conditional_edges.note: live net edge; AGI training met -> goods automation. NON-deterministic (the load-bearing structure).

agent_info_design._comment: Information is split so no agent has the whole picture and some pieces are RELATIONAL (only the net/combinatorial market can absorb them). This is what makes it a real aggregation test, not a transcription task.

marginal_agents.brief: Your models put P(AGI training requirements met by 2041) around {marginal}. You have no information about how it relates to automation.
Your models put P(AI automates 5% of goods tasks by 2039) around {marginal}. No information relating it to AGI.

relational_agents.brief: Your research: goods-and-services automation is strongly gated by AGI-level capability. When AGI training requirements are met, 5% goods automation follows within a couple of years far more often than when they are not.

measurement.coherence_now: monotonicity + cross-edge consistency of net vs independent AMM prices (measurable immediately)
measurement.vs_crowd_now: net-implied conditionals vs the independent-market product (the 'model vs crowd' signal)
measurement.accuracy: log-score on resolution — long-horizon for FTM (2039-2041); the fast accuracy verdict comes from the Stage 3 backtest, not this run
measurement.agent_pnl: log-score payout per agent — does scoring reward the relational agents and punish false-independence polluters? (the thing the offline aggregation model could NOT test)
